extension.summary: Freely-licensed films from Wikidata / Wikimedia Commons
extension.description: Browse and play the WikiFlix catalogue of free films — sourced from Wikidata and hosted on Wikimedia Commons, the Internet Archive, and other open platforms.
extension.news: v0.1.0 - First release. WikiFlix is a catalogue of freely-licensed films, built on Wikidata and streamed from Wikimedia Commons (with fallbacks to Internet Archive, YouTube, Vimeo and DailyMotion). Browse by section, search the catalogue, and play directly in Kodi.
